violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee talked about using wet towel on the 3 compartment sink for wiping hands. Hands should be washed in the hand washing sink when dirty.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Observed multiple food packages in the reach-in freezer that were not labeled to identify content. Food items should be clearly identified.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. Observed kolache dough covered with garbage bag during inspection. Food grade coverings should be used when in contact with food items.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. Back door found with gap along the side. Doors should be properly sealed to prevent entrance of insects and rodents.

Living and sleeping quarters. — --Food establishment operations were conducted in a private home or room used as living or sleeping quarters. Observed employee sleeping area in office/ storage area. Food establishment should not be utilized as sleeping quarters. Toothpaste also found on the hand washing sink. Hand washing sink should not be utilized for brushing teeth.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Scoop handles were not stored handle up and out of product.
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
